Package com.rays.form

Class UserForm

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.rays.common.BaseForm
      • com.rays.form.UserForm
  • public class UserForm
extends BaseForm
    UserForm is a form class used for capturing user-related data. This class extends BaseForm and contains fields for user details with validation constraints.

    This form is used to collect and validate user information such as personal details, login credentials, role assignment, and account status before converting it to a UserDTO object for database operations.

    Author:
    sanjana gangrade

      • getDto

        public BaseDTO getDto()
        Converts the form data to a UserDTO object. This method initializes a DTO using the parent class method and populates it with form field values.
        Overrides:
        getDto in class BaseForm
        Returns:
        the populated UserDTO object
